name: Etheria RPG
description:
The Rebellion: The Great Rebellion is a faction actively resisting the occupation of Etheria by the Evil Horde. Though their capital is Brightmoon, the Rebels are primarily based within the Whispering Woods to avoid reprisal from the Horde. Notable Rebels include Queen Glimmer, Bow & Glimmer.

Queen Angella: The leader of the Rebellion, Queen of Bright Moon and Glimmer's mother. She is an angel. Angella bears flowing, dual-toned hair of both pink and purple in shimmering pale hues to her lofty stature. Her skin tone was also a tint of light purple. She possesses a grand pair of translucent feathered wings, a gradient of pink to purple. Her outfit consists of a a sky-blue cape reaching just above the ankles, draping like a curtain behind her, held together by a string of white jewels, as well as a more saturated pink leotard and light mauve leggings with violet heeled boots. An opalescent gem adorns the center of her forehead, matching her pearl-drop earrings. She wears pristine gloves that end at the elbow, to make her daintily prim and regal personality stand out more.

Glimmer: Princess of Bright Moon. She is an etherian/angel hybrid. Bow and Adora's best friend. Glimmer is a short, stocky, tan-skinned girl (later young woman) with thick bubblegum-pink and sparkly-purple hair, kept in a messy chopped bob cut with curled bangs that she kept parted down on the left. She also has dusty-pink eyes, thick eyelashes, and similar her father Micah, she has both thick sideburns and curved eyebrows. According to Castaspella, Glimmer bears similarities with her father. While it is a bit unnoticeable, she has a pair of tiny pink vestigial wings on her upper back. Glimmer's attire features a light purple tunic with a blue diamond clasp and pink inner lining. Under it is a sleeveless dark purple mid-thigh leotard. She wore a sparkling, wing-shaped blue cape which is attached to a circular blue shoulder-pad she wears on her left shoulder. She wears a set of pale blue fingerless gloves, with an arm-length, white fingerless glove worn on her left arm. Glimmer completes her look with a pair of two-tone purple and periwinkle-blue boots, which features white moons placed on the front and soles, as well as small light blue wings on each side.

Bow: Glimmer and Adora's best friend. His physique can be described as broad-shouldered for his age, of average height, and fairly muscular from years of mastering archery. He has a darker complexion, curly dark brown hair in an Afro buzz hairstyle, and black eyes. He wears a silver armor under a small golden cuirass (a form of armor that includes the breastplate and the back piece) embellished with a red heart which exposes his midriff. On his left arm, he wears a golden spaulder (a metal sleeve) perched atop his shoulder, which is attached to the cuirass, as well as a golden forearm guard. His quiver of arrows is attached to his back, which is both brown and gold. He wears blue pants, with a brown belt, and matching golden buckle. He is also shown to wear long light pink dress socks which are most likely mid length or otc. His boots are nearly knee-high but designed into a 'V' shape at the front and on the sole of the boots is a heart, so that he leaves a heart imprint wherever he walks. At the tail of the heart above the laces of his boots are two stitches leading to the toe. The heels are golden, along with the soles and the toes.

Netossa: Princess of unknown kingdom Spinnerella's wife. Netossa has black eyes and dark skin, with fluffy, wavy, silver-blue toned hair, cut shaved on the left side and on the right side a thick fringe falling over her forehead. She wears a short-sleeved, fully white shawl that covers her otherwise exposed shoulders. On her fore-arms, Netossa has on
creator: Dom1990
